official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound update_tags packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound update_tags body
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed update_tags packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed update_tags packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded tag registry payload map from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the update_tags body.
The official ClientboundUpdateTagsPacket.STREAM_CODEC writes a map from registry ResourceKey to TagNetworkSerialization.NetworkPayload.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundUpdateTagsPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundUpdateTagsPacket preserves the empty tag registry-payload map for this packet-support fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove real tag contents, tag registry hydration, Configuration completion, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer real tag contents, tag registry hydration, Configuration-to-Play readiness, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
